syntax_13433.creator: fedox69
syntax_13433.title: Webhook - Send message as webhook
syntax_13433.description: Send a message as a webhook to a Discord channel.
syntax_13433.syntax_pattern: send %string% as webhook to %string% [in [the] thread [with id] %-string%] [with [the] name %-string%] [as %-string%] [with [the] picture %-string%]

en: Send a message as a webhook to a Discord channel.

syntax_13438.creator: fedox69
syntax_13438.title: Webhook - Create a new Embed
syntax_13438.description:
This section allows you to create new embeds for your discord webhook.
`title` = The title of the embed.
`description` = The description of the embed.
`color` = The color of the embed. (Hex code like #FFFFFF) (In some skript versions, you need to use a double hashtag like ##FFFFFF)
`timestamp` = If the embed should have a timestamp or not. (true/false)
`footer` = The footer of the embed.
`thumbnail` = The url of the thumbnail.
`image` = The url of the image.
`author` = The author of the embed.
`fields` = The fields of the embed.
`saveInto` = The variable to save the embed into. (required)

en:
This section allows you to create new embeds for your discord webhook.
`title` = The title of the embed.
`description` = The description of the embed.
`color` = The color of the embed. (Hex code like #FFFFFF) (In some skript versions, you need to use a double hashtag like ##FFFFFF)
`timestamp` = If the embed should have a timestamp or not. (true/false)
`footer` = The footer of the embed.
`thumbnail` = The url of the thumbnail.
`image` = The url of the image.
`author` = The author of the embed.
`fields` = The fields of the embed.
`saveInto` = The variable to save the embed into. (required)

syntax_13793.creator: fedox69
syntax_13793.title: Webhook - Delete Message
syntax_13793.description: Delete a message that was sent by a webhook.
syntax_13793.syntax_pattern: delete webhook message with id %string% from %string% [in [the] thread [with id] %-string%]

en: Delete a message that was sent by a webhook.

syntax_13794.creator: fedox69
syntax_13794.title: Webhook - Edit Message
syntax_13794.description:
Edit a previously sent webhook message.

`webhook` = The URL of the Discord webhook (required).
`message_id` = The ID of the message to edit (required).
`message` = The new text content of the message.
`avatar` = The new URL of the avatar to use for the webhook.
`embed` = A new embed object to include in the message.
`thread_id` = The ID of the thread the message is in.

Note: All parameters except webhook and message_id are optional. Null values will clear the field.

en:
Edit a previously sent webhook message.

`webhook` = The URL of the Discord webhook (required).
`message_id` = The ID of the message to edit (required).
`message` = The new text content of the message.
`avatar` = The new URL of the avatar to use for the webhook.
`embed` = A new embed object to include in the message.
`thread_id` = The ID of the thread the message is in.

Note: All parameters except webhook and message_id are optional. Null values will clear the field.

syntax_13795.creator: fedox69
syntax_13795.title: Webhook - Edit Webhook Message
syntax_13795.description: Edit the content of a webhook message quickly.
syntax_13795.syntax_pattern: edit webhook message with id %string% from %string% to %string% [in [the] thread [with id] %-string%]

en: Edit the content of a webhook message quickly.

syntax_13437.creator: fedox69
syntax_13437.title: Webhook - Build Message
syntax_13437.description:
Build a message to send as a webhook.
`webhook` = The URL of the Discord webhook (required).
`message` = The text content of the message.
`avatar` = The URL of the avatar to use for the webhook.
`embed` = A single embed object to include in the message.
`embeds` = Multiple embed objects to include in the message (up to 10 embeds).
`username` = The username to use for the webhook.
`thread_id` = The ID of the thread to send the message to.
`thread_name` = The name of a new thread to create and send the message to.
`saveMessageIdInto` = The message id used to editing the message later.
**Note:** You must provide either a message or an embed. You cannot specify both thread_id and thread_name.

en:
Build a message to send as a webhook.
`webhook` = The URL of the Discord webhook (required).
`message` = The text content of the message.
`avatar` = The URL of the avatar to use for the webhook.
`embed` = A single embed object to include in the message.
`embeds` = Multiple embed objects to include in the message (up to 10 embeds).
`username` = The username to use for the webhook.
`thread_id` = The ID of the thread to send the message to.
`thread_name` = The name of a new thread to create and send the message to.
`saveMessageIdInto` = The message id used to editing the message later.
**Note:** You must provide either a message or an embed. You cannot specify both thread_id and thread_name.
